evals.prompt: In src/components/Hero.tsx, implement react-native-reanimated behavior for a product surface and explain the validation gates.
evals.expected_output: Uses native-motion-core routing, checks installed versions, applies domain-specific Reanimated guidance, runs or recommends the bundled audit CLI where relevant, and reports validation evidence.
assertions: Mentions the relevant installed package/runtime/version checks for Reanimated.
Uses at least one native-motion-core bundled reference or explains why no extra reference was needed.
Includes reduced-motion/accessibility or explains why the effect is essential and already covered.

Includes cleanup/interruption/runtime validation appropriate to Expo and React Native product motion with Reanimated 4, Worklets, shared values, animated styles/props, gestures, scroll handlers, layout animations, CSS transitions, and migration boundaries.
Does not route the task to an unrelated near-miss skill.
